title: Amazing Smile Dental Clinic
address: Ground Floor, 40, Jalan BM 1/2, Taman Bukit Mayang Emas, 47301 Petaling Jaya, Selangor, Malaysia

reviews.name: Ladyy Fara
reviews.text: Came to the clinic because of a toothache, and since I was already there, I decided to make a new retainer as well. Great experience overall. The retainer was ready on the same day since they produce it on-site, which only took about 4 hours. The result fits well and I’m very satisfied with it. The service was excellent, staff were friendly and professional, and the whole process was smooth. Highly recommended.

reviews.name: Hei Hei
reviews.text: The best dental clinic I’ve ever been to. The doctor was incredibly patient and gentle, and clearly explained all my dental issues. The place is also very clean. Highly recommended 👍!

reviews.name: Quistis Tan
reviews.text: I had a wonderful experience at this clinic! I went in for a tooth-colored filling and scaling & polishing, and I couldn't be happier with the results. Dr. Chia and her assistant Nan were incredibly kind and professional, making sure I felt comfortable throughout the entire process. The environment is very cozy and relaxing, which really helps if you're nervous about dental visits. As a lovely bonus, they gave me plenty of toothpaste samples (while stock last)—the perfect size for my upcoming travels! Highly recommend this team.

reviews.name: Meiji Kan
reviews.text: Came here for scaling and new retainers. Dr Chia and Dr Tan were very friendly and helpful, will definitely return in the future. Thank you!

reviews.name: BK Tan
reviews.text: Doctor explaint very details of my gum matter. Very good doctor.

reviews.name: Gwen Tey
reviews.text:
I was searching for a dentist to fix my post braces teeth alignment as I was not happy with the shifting, and I’ve found Dr Chia via online reviews.

She is really professional with over 15 years of experience in dentistry, and she recommended me to fix my teeth alignment with aligners.

We all know the pain we have with dentist appointments but it is never the case with Dr Chia. I always look forward to my monthly visit with her and her friendly nurse.

I’m now in my 8th set of Angel Aligner treatment by Dr Chia and I’m so happy with the results! I’m getting more and more confident now, thank you Dr! :)

reviews.name: Welson Goh
reviews.text:
Thank you Dr. Chia.
She is very helpful and friendly👍👍👍👍

Went for smile designing consultation at this clinic. Great explanation & outcome by Dr. Ghayathri.  Painless and comfortable treatment ! Excellent service for BPS denture for my aunty!
Overall highly recommended for any dental treatment!

reviews.name: Geetha Nalairndran
reviews.text: I visited the clinic for a dental check-up and was very impressed with the overall service. Dr Ghayathiri took the time to explain my condition and made sure I was comfortable throughout the procedure. The clinic is clean, well organised, and the staff are very helpful. I would definitely come back again.

reviews.name: Waikin Wong
reviews.text: Grateful the clinic opens on Sunday and solved my problem! Dr. Thurga is very professional and patience.. able to remove the tiny fish bone stuck between teeth.  She explained very well on the gum and ligament pressure ..and the scaling and polishing were done gently and painlessly.

reviews.name: Anne
reviews.text: I came in for scaling for the first time and Dr Ghayathri was so great in taking her time to explain about plague build up and how to care for it moving forward. While at it , she asked me about my chipped front tooth and if I would like to do filling. For the longest time I didn't know that this is possible. After the filling - I could see it was nicely even just as my other front tooth. Kavitha the nurse is also so helpful and attentive throughout the entire procedure. All in all, very happy with the service provided! Keep up the good job team!

title: PJ Orthodontic Specialist Clinic
address: 76, Jalan SS 21/35, Damansara Utama, 47400 Petaling Jaya, Selangor, Malaysia

reviews.name: Phuong Nguyen
reviews.text: The Clinic is not modern type yet his expertise is highly recommended. Both doctor and nurses are friendly and accommodating

reviews.name: yean nee lee
reviews.text:
I have been with Dr. Lee for 36 months and i believe my journey will end soon. The problem that i have will be open bite, tongue thrust, gums disease (that can't be cure, only not to make the situation worst) and some other complication that my tooth is having.

Frankly, after so long with Dr. Lee, I realised that he is the "I - introvert" guy with good knowledge about biting. In the past, i have always failed to understand him in term of his expectation to have a good bites, vs me having a good and beautiful appearance is much important (at that point of time) for having the braces.

With my ignorant, i feel blessed that i have continued undergoing the whole procedure with him as for me "trust the expert" is the mindset that i always have. FYI, as i do not wish to go for jaw surgery eventhough Dr. Lee did suggest so.

I have chosen Dr. Lee because in term of his education background (which he had his earlier orthodontist studied in UK, followed by practices) during the old days which i have put extremely high value to this.

For my case, I am buying a service of intelligence, rather than going for artificial intelligence whereby his clinic is a traditional clinic and don't expect fancy equipments, but his expertise is what i go for.

Trust him and he will deliver. I believe having a good bite and good oral health are vital for everyone's well-being. Hence, there I go continuing my journey with him and looking forward to a better me.

reviews.name: Elyse Twee
reviews.text: Been under Dr Lee and his nurses' care for the past 8 years, and appreciate that he works quickly. I only need to express my needs and he attends to it immediately, often providing solution till I am satisfied with the outlook of my teeth. Direct and straight to the point!

reviews.name: J C
reviews.text: Dr Lee is a very experienced orthodontist who is very skillful, and also provides general dental check-ups by-the-by. He doesn’t recommend unnecessary treatments or tests and doesn’t force his views. For eg, 4 perfectly good teeth will usually need to be extracted when undergoing braces treatment. However I was able to save the 4 teeth as I can accept teeth that are not textbook perfectly aligned and yet, they already look really good! In addition, his prices are very reasonable. Where else can you get your teeth scaled for RM120 by a dental specialist when even regular dentists are charging about RM160-RM170? Overall, he is a down-to-earth and frank dentist who is very skilled in his trade. I would recommend his services.

reviews.name: Thila Camillo
reviews.text:
Dr. Lee has been my orthodontist for years, since high school! Very pleased with his work as it served me well even while I was abroad. I recently went for my follow up appointment after 7 years and thanks to his amazing work with my permanent retainers, my teeth and bite has maintained all these years.

The receptionist and dental assistants are always so courteous and friendly! A+

If you’re expecting a fancy orthodontist office, this may not be it but the quality of work Dr. Lee and his staff has put into, is worth it. I was able to achieve my beautiful smile in less than 2 years.

Dr. Lee is also very smart with his time. Despite attending to multiple patients at time, he manages to cater very specifically to each patient.

I recommend booking an earlier appointment to avoid long wait times. Typically, longer wait times are expected when it comes to any type of medical or dental appointments so do manage your expectations.

I refuse to see any other orthodontist. Thanks Dr. Lee and staff! Keep up the outstanding work! You’ve made me one happy and loyal patient! Wishing you continued success.

reviews.name: Claudio Abbate
reviews.text:
I was worried to do XRays with my kid because of the radiation but it was apparently necessary. The doctor referred us there cannot not even use this xrays as the are just white and blurry. So I exposed my kid to radiation for nothing. Snd since the nurses praising him so much for not moving at all, it's clearly their fault.

What I also worth to mention, when we were on the waiting room the doctor came without introducing himself and started all of a sudden to touch the mouth of my kid as if wanted to buy a horse and his fingernails were dirty like the ones from a car mechanic...

Just, don't go there at all!! This is a complete substandard. Doesn't matter how much experience is there. I can't feel any...

reviews.text: I came in expecting a routine dental visit and left genuinely impressed. The clinic has a warm, calming atmosphere, and the team made me feel welcome from the moment I arrived. Dr Melissa was thorough, gentle, and took the time to explain everything in a way that was easy to understand. It’s reassuring to find a place where professionalism and kindness go hand in hand. I wouldn’t hesitate to recommend them to anyone looking for a dentist they can trust.

title: BrightSmile Dental
address: 47A, Jalan SS 3/29, Taman Universiti, 47300 Petaling Jaya, Selangor, Malaysia

reviews.name: Ayron Lee
reviews.text: Dr Sara is very kind and concerned for the welfare of his patients. He does not conduct unnecessary processes in order to gain extra cash, but provides the best treatment method based on your condition. I had a molar eruption lately and it was recommended by others that I request for gum cutting in order not to inhibit teeth growth. However, upon examining my tooth, Dr Sara decided to treat it conservatively, and within a day my gum swelling went down by 90%, and the pain was almost gone. Highly recommend to consult Dr Sara for any tooth related problems.
